title: TasktreeTemplate
description: A workspace template file (kind: Template). Templates define reusable workspace configurations with variable substitution, reducing repetitive setup for common task patterns.

name.description: Template name used to reference it in CLI commands (e.g., 'tasktree init --from bugfix').

description.description: Human-readable description of the template's purpose.

parameters.description: Declared template parameters. All {{variable}} references in the template body must be listed here.

template.description: The template body. May contain {{variable}} and {{variable | default:value}} references in any string field.

metadata.description: Workspace metadata template. May contain variable references.

name.description: Workspace name template. Variable references like {{ticket_number}} are resolved at init time.

labels.description: Label templates. Values may contain variable references.

annotations.description: Annotation templates. Values may contain variable references.

sources.description: Source templates. Fields may contain variable references.

bootstrap.description: Bootstrap step templates. Fields may contain variable references.

BootstrapStepTemplate.description: A bootstrap step template. String fields may contain variable references.

required.description: If true, the parameter must be provided at init time (no default). Defaults to false.

default.description: Default value used when the parameter is not explicitly provided.

description.description: Human-readable description of this parameter's purpose.

SourceSpecTemplate.description: A source spec within a template. String fields may contain {{variable}} references.

path.description: Relative checkout path (may contain variable references).

GitSourceSpecTemplate.description: Git source configuration within a template. All string fields may contain {{variable}} references.

url.description: Git clone URL or alias (may contain variable references).

ref.description: Ref to check out (may contain variable references).

branch.description: Branch name to create or track (may contain variable references).
